summary.key_theme: Figma 面臨 Google AI 設計工具的激烈競爭壓力，加上財報後分析師下調目標價，導致市場對其成長動能與估值產生疑慮。

bullish.title: Figma's Next Phase: AI Monetization and Platform-Wide Expansion
bullish.reason: 文章強調 Figma 透過 AI 變現策略與平台擴張，有望在 2026 年提升營收，展現長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Figma and Agentic Coding: Why MCP Integrations Matter for FIG Stock?
bullish.reason: 探討 MCP 整合對 Figma 的潛在技術優勢，認為代理式編碼技術能強化產品生態系，對股價有正面支撐作用。

bearish.title: Figma Stock Falls Thursday As Google Expands AI Design Push
bearish.reason: Google 推出的 AI 設計工具（如 vibe coding）直接威脅 Figma 的市場份額，引發投資人對其核心競爭力的擔憂。

bearish.title: Stifel and Morgan Stanley Lower Figma (FIG) Price Targets After Q4 Earnings
bearish.reason: Stifel 與 Morgan Stanley 等大型投行在 Q4 財報後下調目標價，反映市場對其獲利能力與成長放緩的負面預期。

bearish.title: Figma (FIG) Down 6.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
bearish.reason: 財報後股價累計下跌 6.3%，顯示市場對公司短期內重拾動能缺乏信心。

bearish.title: Is It Time To Reassess Figma (FIG) After This Year’s 36.9% Share Price Slide
bearish.reason: 今年以來股價重挫 36.9%，迫使投資人重新評估其基本面與市場定位。

bearish.title: Figma (FIG) Valuation Check As Shares Struggle And Market Reassesses Growth Versus Losses
bearish.reason: 市場正嚴格審視 Figma 的估值，質疑其在成長與虧損之間的平衡能力。

bearish.title: Figma's Push Into AI Is Great, But Not Great Enough To Buy
bearish.reason: 儘管營收成長 40%，但分析師認為 AI 投入不足以支撐當前股價，給予保守評級。

bearish.title: Figma (FIG) Stock Is Trending After Google's AI 'Vibe Design' Tool Unveiled
bearish.reason: 報導指出 Figma 股價在 Google 發布 AI 工具後出現盤後下跌，反映市場對競爭加劇的即時反應。

neutral.title: Is Figma a Buy?
neutral.reason: 文章對 Figma 是否值得買入進行多空分析，未給出明確方向，僅提供投資人參考觀點。

neutral.title: FIG Stock Outlook: Can AI Credit Monetization Lift 2026 Sales?
neutral.reason: 探討 AI 信用變現模式對 2026 年營收的潛在影響，屬於中性的前瞻性分析。

neutral.title: Watching Figma; Shares Move Higher; Traders Circulate Post By Google Member Of Technical Staff
neutral.reason: 報導市場因 Google 員工貼文引發的股價波動，屬於短期市場雜訊，未對基本面產生實質影響。
